description: Classic speedrun dungeon (Serpentshrine Cavern-like) with both 10-man and 25-man difficulties enabled: untouched, the difficulty select's first appended option (10-man, DungeonConstants::DIFFICULTY_ALL['10_man'] = 1) is auto-selected by the browser. dungeon_start_map_icon_id is entirely absent: dungeondifficultyselect.js's global refreshSelectPickers() call (fired because this dungeon is a speedrun dungeon) initializes Tom Select on the still-empty start select as a side effect; dungeonstartselect.js then unconditionally removes its options before its own refresh, and the resulting resync does not re-add a value.
